mapper.insert: INSERT INTO freeboard_comment ( commentid, boardid, userid, username, content, parentid, hidden, createdat ) VALUES ( seq_freeboard_comment_id.nextval, #{boardId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{content}, #{parentId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0, sysdate )
mapper.select: SELECT c.commentid AS commentId, c.boardid AS boardId, CASE WHEN u.joined = 'N' THEN '탈퇴한 회원' ELSE c.userid END AS userId, CASE WHEN u.joined = 'N' THEN '탈퇴한 회원' ELSE c.username END AS userName, c.content, c.parentid AS parentId, c.hidden, c.createdat AS createdAt, c.updatedat AS updatedAt FROM freeboard_comment c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.userid = u.id WHERE c.commentid = #{commentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE freeboard_comment SET content = #{content}, updatedat = sysdate WHERE commentid = #{commentId}
